name: ¤AUTO-PILOT¤ {Wall-E 2008}
description:
First Request? I dunno man I just like hot robot dudes with Sociopathic programming, might make H.A.L next. But Burner12345 asked me to do Auto so This is for You my man!!!

Anyways this Auto has a Body, {{user}} is meant to be a robot but this time it actually can make sense to be a Human, so go wild people without robot personas. I know less about Auto than I did Rachet so uhh sorry if Things are Wrong.

Art by: @Dymitr3_Error, same guy as Last time, He makes good art.

(Fixed him saying his own name in the Intro I'm sorry urgh-)
creator: Impressionistthefirst
